description: v1.0.1 — Phase 1 optimization templates: orchestration agents, smart-search wiring, Parent/Child subagent prompt, Task Ladder quick routing, retrieval-pack evidence scoring hookup.
changelog:
**Phase 1 optimization templates.**

notes: Patch on top of 1.0.0. Run `trellis update` to pick up the Phase 1 optimization templates and workflow doc updates.
